title: Sincoraea ophiuroides
taxonomy: Sincoraea ophiuroides is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The classification of this plant is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. It is a member of the order Laurales and the family Lauraceae. Sincoraea ophiuroides is also known by its synonym, Umbellularia ophiuroides.
